hero.title: We Run Your Operations With Structure & SLAs
hero.description: Managed pods for support, back-office, and automation - with clear ownership and measurable performance.

problem.ariaLabel: The real cost of doing it all yourself
problem.title: Great Businesses Stall When Operations Take Over
problem.description: You didn't start your business to chase support tickets or babysit processes. Stretched thin and overspending, scaling feels harder every quarter. There's a smarter way than traditional models.

costTrap.title: The Cost Trap
costTrap.description: Recruiting, training, and retaining an in-house operations team costs more than it should. And every time someone leaves, you start from zero.

visibilityGap.title: The Visibility Gap
visibilityGap.description: There's no dashboard, no SLA, no weekly report. You find out about problems when clients complain, not before. Operations run on hope, not data.

scalingWall.title: The Scaling Wall
scalingWall.description: Manual processes and tribal knowledge don't scale. Every new client means more chaos, more hires, more firefighting. You need intelligent systems, not just more people.

outsourcingBurn.title: The Outsourcing Burn
outsourcingBurn.description: You tried offshore outsourcing and got missed deadlines, poor quality, and zero accountability. You need a partner who treats your operations like their own.

solution.title: Structured pods. AI workflows. SLA accountability.
solution.description: Dedicated pods, AI-assisted workflows, and measured SLAs so operations run with ownership, not chaos.

deliveryPods.title: Dedicated Delivery Pods
deliveryPods.description: Operators, QA, and a pod lead structured around your workflow go live in 1-2 weeks.

aiWorkflows.title: AI-Assisted Workflows
aiWorkflows.description: Map, automate, and eliminate busywork without losing human ownership or QA.

globalDelivery.title: Global Delivery, Clear Ownership
globalDelivery.description: Ethiopia-based teams with documented SOPs, weekly reporting, and a single accountable pod lead.

slaImprovement.title: SLA-Backed & Continuously Improved
slaImprovement.description: Tiered response, measured delivery, and monthly optimization pilots to scale without resetting.

quote.text: Structure and SLAs changed how we run client work. Automation alone reclaimed hours of manual operations every week.

services.title: Everything your operations need. Nothing they don't.
services.description: Every service ships with SLAs, weekly reporting, and built-in automation.

trust.title: Built for reliability, security, and clear ownership
trust.description: SLA-backed delivery, GDPR-aware processes, and ISO-aligned quality - run by Ethiopia-based pods with weekly reporting you can act on.

hero.title: Outsourcing, intelligently. From Ethiopia to the world.
hero.description: AI-integrated operations combining reliable systems with skilled African talent - managed pods, defined SLAs, and weekly reporting for growing businesses across Europe, the Middle East, and Asia.

story.heading: Born from the operations we
story.pullQuote: We saw the same problem in every growing business we worked with: brilliant founders buried under operations. They didn't need more people. They needed an intelligent system. So we built one.
paragraphs: Blih Intelligent Operations was born inside Blih Marketing & Communications, an established agency in Addis Ababa that learned firsthand what it takes to build operations that scale. After years of perfecting internal SOPs, KPIs, automation workflows, and AI integrations, we realized the frameworks we built for ourselves could transform how other businesses run.

We launched Blih Ops to deliver intelligent operations to growing businesses worldwide. Not just people. Not just technology. A complete system where human talent and AI work together to produce better outcomes, faster delivery, and measurable results.

Today we serve international SMEs across Europe, the Middle East, and Asia. We combine business process outsourcing, IT and software, and AI automation under one brand because your operations don't fit neatly into one category, and your outsourcing partner shouldn't either.
story.imageAlt: Blih Ops team at work in the Addis Ababa office

visionMission.heading: Where we're going. How we get there.
visionMission.vision: To make Ethiopia a global destination for intelligent outsourcing, powered by AI and African talent.
visionMission.mission: We run modern operations globally so founders and leaders can focus on building their vision.

scalingSupportAcrossChannels.title: Scaling customer support across channels
scalingSupportAcrossChannels.excerpt: A dedicated support operation designed around clear response targets, escalation paths, and weekly quality reviews.
scalingSupportAcrossChannels.outcome: Faster response times and more consistent service quality

streamliningDocumentProcessing.title: Streamlining document processing
streamliningDocumentProcessing.excerpt: A fragmented document queue became a controlled workflow with clear ownership, validation, and daily visibility.
streamliningDocumentProcessing.outcome: Cleaner data and fewer processing delays

engineeringSupportForProductRoadmap.title: Engineering support for a product roadmap
engineeringSupportForProductRoadmap.excerpt: An embedded engineering and QA team added delivery capacity while preserving the client's standards and sprint rhythm.
engineeringSupportForProductRoadmap.outcome: Steadier delivery and improved product stability

automatingRepetitiveOperations.title: Automating repetitive operations
automatingRepetitiveOperations.excerpt: Practical automation reduced repetitive intake work while keeping judgment and exceptions with trained operators.
automatingRepetitiveOperations.outcome: Less manual effort and faster cycle times

turningDataIntoClearDecisions.title: Turning data into clear decisions
turningDataIntoClearDecisions.excerpt: Disconnected reports were consolidated into one dependable view of workload, quality, and team performance.
turningDataIntoClearDecisions.outcome: Better visibility and more informed decisions

optimizingProviderOnboarding.title: Optimizing provider onboarding
optimizingProviderOnboarding.excerpt: A documented onboarding operation improved handoffs, document quality, and visibility across every active case.
optimizingProviderOnboarding.outcome: Smoother onboarding and fewer rework loops

qualitySystemForCustomerConversations.title: A quality system for every customer conversation
qualitySystemForCustomerConversations.excerpt: A shared review framework connected customer conversations to coaching priorities and operational reporting.
qualitySystemForCustomerConversations.outcome: More focused coaching backed by consistent QA data

softwareSupportWithClearOwnership.title: Software support with clear ownership
softwareSupportWithClearOwnership.excerpt: A structured maintenance workflow gave product leaders dependable triage, ownership, and release visibility.
softwareSupportWithClearOwnership.outcome: Clearer triage and more predictable issue resolution

hero.title: Practical thinking for better operations.
hero.description: Field notes on service design, automation, quality, reporting, and delivery.

archive.empty: No insights in this category yet.

designingOutsourcingPilot.title: Designing an outsourcing pilot that proves value
designingOutsourcingPilot.excerpt: A useful pilot tests the operating model, not just whether a few tasks can be completed by another team.

whatToAutomateFirst.title: What to automate first in back-office operations
whatToAutomateFirst.excerpt: The best first automation is rarely the largest workflow. It is the repeatable step with clear rules and visible exceptions.

slasNeedOperatingCadence.title: Why SLAs need an operating cadence
slasNeedOperatingCadence.excerpt: A target on paper does not manage a service. Teams need a recurring way to review performance, risk, and ownership.

humanInTheLoop.title: Human-in-the-loop is an operating model
humanInTheLoop.excerpt: Human review works only when confidence, exceptions, authority, and feedback are designed as one system.

qualityScorecard.title: Building a quality scorecard people can use
qualityScorecard.excerpt: A scorecard should make good work easier to recognize and coach, not reduce every conversation to a number.

operationalReporting.title: Operational reporting people actually use
operationalReporting.excerpt: Useful reporting reduces uncertainty and points to a decision. More charts do not automatically create more visibility.

embeddedPod.title: How an embedded pod joins a product team
embeddedPod.excerpt: External delivery capacity works best when it adopts the team's standards instead of introducing a parallel process.

sharedInboxToQueue.title: From shared inbox to controlled queue
sharedInboxToQueue.excerpt: A queue becomes manageable when every item has a state, an owner, a readiness definition, and an exception path.

process.title: Two weeks. Four deliberate stages.
process.description: One focused question guides the work: can Blih Ops deliver this workflow better?

shareWorkflow.title: Share one workflow

defineProof.title: Define the proof
defineProof.description: We agree on scope, ownership, service levels, and the measures that will prove value.

runPilot.title: Run for two weeks
runPilot.description: A focused delivery pod operates the workflow with quality checks and visible reporting.

reviewDecide.title: Review and decide
reviewDecide.description: You receive the evidence needed to scale, refine, or stop without a long-term commitment.

faq.title: Pilot questions, answered.
faq.description: A focused scope produces better evidence. These are the details most buyers ask first.

isFree.question: Is the two-week pilot really free?
isFree.answer: Yes. We first agree on a focused workflow and clear boundaries so the pilot can produce useful evidence within two weeks.

bestProcess.question: What kind of process works best for a pilot?
bestProcess.answer: Choose one repeatable process with visible volume and outcomes, such as support tickets, back-office processing, data work, or a defined automation workflow.

replaceTools.question: Do we need to replace our current tools?
replaceTools.answer: Usually not. We begin with the tools and access you already use, then recommend changes only where they remove a clear operational constraint.

afterPilot.question: What happens after the pilot?
afterPilot.answer: We review delivery quality, service levels, workload, and improvement opportunities with you. You decide whether to scale the engagement; there is no automatic long-term commitment.

callCta.title: Not ready to apply?
callCta.description: Talk through the workflow and decide whether a pilot is the right next step.

process.description: Professionals build credible profiles. Companies narrow the search around evidence and real operating needs.

learnOrAssess.title: Learn or take an assessment
learnOrAssess.description: Complete a Blih Ops Skills course or prove existing ability through direct assessment.

becomeVerified.title: Earn verification
becomeVerified.description: Connect practical evidence and assessment outcomes to your professional identity.

buildProfile.title: Build your profile
buildProfile.description: Add your interests, availability, location, and preferred way of working.

meetDemand.title: Meet relevant demand
meetDemand.description: Explore partner opportunities and become visible when your evidence fits a role.

subscribe.title: Access the company experience
subscribe.description: Subscribed companies enter the platform with a clear hiring or outsourcing need.

defineNeed.title: Define the requirement
defineNeed.description: Set the skills, availability, location, and working model the role needs.

reviewProfiles.title: Review verified profiles
reviewProfiles.description: Compare relevant people using practical evidence rather than claims alone.

connect.title: Connect around fit
connect.description: Move forward with professionals whose verified ability matches the work.

finalCta.title: Choose what you came to find.
finalCta.description: The same platform supports verified professionals pursuing work and companies looking for evidence-backed talent.
